# Fixture Documentation

This file is part of the E2E test fixture workspace. Do not edit by hand —
test cases match its exact content.

## Features

- Feature Alpha: processes uppercase data.
- Feature Beta: increments a counter.
- 한국어 지원: 멀티바이트 문자도 포함합니다.

## Usage

The AlphaService and BetaWidget work together. A search for
`class AlphaService` should land here and in alpha.py.
